nasb.text: Then you are to say to them, ‘It is because your forefathers have forsaken Me,’ declares the Lord, ‘and have followed other gods and served them and bowed down to them; but Me they have forsaken and have not kept My law.

esv.text: then you shall say to them: ‘Because your fathers have forsaken me, declares the Lord, and have gone after other gods and have served and worshiped them, and have forsaken me and have not kept my law,

cnv.text: 你就要回答他們：‘因為你們的列祖離棄了我，他們隨從別的神，事奉敬拜他們；他們離棄了我，不遵守我的律法。

ccb.text: 你要对他们说，‘耶和华说，你们的祖先背弃我，去跟随、供奉、祭拜别的神明；他们背弃我，不遵守我的律法。
